title: epacris exserta var. virgata
intro: Epacris exserta var. virgata, also known as the white heath, is a variety of the Epacris exserta plant species, native to Australia. It is a shrub with white or pale yellow flowers and is traditionally used for its medicinal properties. The plant is known to have anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help to reduce fever and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. The herbal preparations of Epacris exserta var. virgata include tea infusions and tinctures, which can be used to relieve colds and flu symptoms and promote overall well-being.
